title: jules-quickstack
description: (made by AI) When you press the keybind (K by default), it moves all items from your inventory into nearby containers that already contain those items.
body:
When you press the keybind (K by default), it moves all items from your inventory into nearby containers that already contain those items.

The range in which to check for nearby chests can be configured in `config/quickstack-common.toml`. It is 16 by default. Note that all containers within the range are included, even ones blocked by other blocks.

Installing [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) is **highly recommended**, that way you can lock your hotbar and other useful items which prevents them from being quick-stacked as well as dropped, shift-clicked, etc - press Alt and click on slots you want to lock, very useful even without quickstack.

Please note that this MOD has been entirely made by Google Jules AI. However I am using it in my heavily modded playthrough and it works, so enjoy. I personally can't live with quick stack and it is a crime that no one has made it for 1.21.1 NeoForge.

https://github.com/italian-brainrot/jules-quickstack-1.21.1-neoforge
